summary: Executed backend pytest regression plus mobile-first Expo web-preview integration checks for calibrated wheel render updates. All requested functional flows passed.
action_items: Optional hardening: add stable testID/data-testid hooks for web iframe path and injected adapter controls.
Optional config consistency: align frontend env key usage with platform guideline (EXPO_BACKEND_URL).
critical_code_review_comments: No backend endpoint regressions reproduced in this run.
Frontend API helper currently reads EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL; guideline documentation references EXPO_BACKEND_URL, which can cause future configuration drift.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ render record via POST /api/renders in pytest persistence check.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified public preview URL https://hex-palette-render.preview.emergentagent.com with mobile viewport 375x667. Confirmed line thickness sync to --mh-thick, hue->A/B/centre readout updates, website label wheel colors, and platformer grid renders 70 recolored cells.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no requested feature failures reproduced.
